description: Letter from the office of Yehoshuaʿ Nagid (b. 1310-d. 1355) seeking to bring peace to the community and also urging them to be charitable and especially warning them not to resort to Muslim courts without permission of "the bet din of mutahaddithin" in Cairo. (Information from Cohen)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-14 מקהיר לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
